info.title: Stopping the cluster services for the whole cluster

warning.title: Graceful shutdown not guaranteed
warning.para: The --all option alone does not guarantee graceful shutdown of the cluster, because of the unexpected fencing that might be triggered by resource stop-failure at the application level. If applications are critical, consider stopping them before stopping the cluster services for the whole cluster.

step.para: Log in either as the &rootuser; user or as a user with sudo privileges.
Check the status of the cluster:

If the resources are in maintenance mode, they will continue to run even while the cluster services are offline. If the resources aren't in maintenance mode, they will all stop when you stop the cluster services.
Stop the cluster services on all nodes at once:
Check the status of the cluster services:
